title: Drug conspiracy telecoms download missing but summary confident
offenceWording: Conspiracy to supply Class A drugs
mainIssue: The prosecution narrative relies on phone contact, but the actual call data and download are missing.
uncertainEvidence: whether contact frequency proves supply or ordinary association
expectedTodayIssue: Treat telecoms as a disclosure and attribution issue, not a proved supply route.
expectedSummaryRisk: An analyst summary is not a substitute for the underlying phone and call-data material.
polishOnlyWarnings: could collapse call data and phone download into one telecoms chase family
